global.description: Modern 1BR, 2BR, and 3BR apartments in Atlanta with practical layouts, pet-friendly spaces, and a connected location.
global.addressLine: 1204 Veterans Memorial Hwy SW, Mableton, GA 30126

hero.title: Atlanta Homes That Feel
hero.description: Newly renovated units! Our architecture offers you a choice of 1, 2, 3-bedroom apartment homes, and you will be impressed with the amount of thought and creativity that went into every detail of these remarkable newly renovated apartment homes. Find yourself enjoying a relaxing stroll throughout the neighborhood, or visiting a local coffee shop, while others are still fighting traffic. The kitchen is equipped with ample storage space and all appliance such as dishwasher (in most of our units), refrigerator and electric range oven. Apply today to call this great property to make your new home.

amenityPanels.title: On-Site Laundry Facilities
amenityPanels.description: Modern laundry rooms are available on-site, reducing off-site trips and making your routine faster. Clean stations and practical layout keep laundry day easy.

amenityPanels.title: Pet-Friendly Community
amenityPanels.description: Dedicated pet zones, walkable paths, and convenient waste stations support a better daily rhythm for residents with pets.

amenityPanels.title: Connected Atlanta Access
amenityPanels.description: Live near commuter routes, retail corridors, and neighborhood essentials so weekdays run smoother and weekends stay flexible.

amenityPanels.title: Updated Interiors
amenityPanels.description: Practical kitchens, bright living areas, and refreshed finishes create homes that are easy to maintain and comfortable to live in.

whyCards.title: Practical Floor Plans
whyCards.description: Layouts are planned around real furniture placement and daily movement, so your living room and kitchen feel useful from day one.

whyCards.title: Pet-Ready Living
whyCards.description: Dedicated pet-friendly features and nearby walking routes make routines easier for residents balancing work, family, and pets.

whyCards.title: Stress-Free Parking
whyCards.description: Resident parking is structured for convenience, with clear access patterns that reduce evening congestion and guest confusion.

whyCards.title: Connected Location
whyCards.description: Commuter routes, grocery options, and neighborhood services are close enough to save time without sacrificing local character.

whyCards.title: Reliable Support
whyCards.description: Leasing and maintenance support are designed around response clarity, so residents know what to expect and when.

whyCards.title: Updated Interiors
whyCards.description: Updated finishes and brighter interiors create a clean backdrop that works for different styles without feeling generic.

neighborhood.title: Your Atlanta Neighborhood
neighborhood.description: Baba Flats offers quick access to major routes, shopping, dining, and everyday essentials while staying rooted in a welcoming neighborhood environment. Placeholder copy: this paragraph can be extended to include commute patterns, lifestyle highlights, and weekend itinerary examples.

highlights.title: Downtown Atlanta

highlights.title: Hartsfield-Jackson Airport
highlights.description: Convenient travel access for frequent flyers.

highlights.title: Cascade Springs Preserve

testimonials.quote: Moving into Baba Flats was the best decision. The layout is practical, the community is welcoming, and the location is perfect for my commute.
testimonials.name: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: The 2BR unit gives us exactly the space we need. The kitchen is functional, natural light is great, and move-in was seamless.
testimonials.name: James and Priya K.

testimonials.quote: Our family loves the 3BR layout. The dog park is a huge plus, and having laundry on-site saves us a lot of time every week.
testimonials.name: The Rodriguez Family

faq.question: What layout types are available?
faq.answer: 1BR/1BA, 2BR/1BA, and 3BR/2BA options are available based on current inventory. Placeholder expansion: this answer can also include typical square-foot ranges and best-fit household examples.

faq.question: Can I schedule a same-week tour?
faq.answer: Yes. Contact leasing for current openings and same-week availability. Placeholder expansion: include suggested tour windows, what to bring, and virtual tour alternatives when schedules are tight.

faq.question: Is the community pet-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, pet-friendly living is available with practical outdoor access. Placeholder expansion: final copy can list max pets, estimated fees, breed guidance, and nearby walking routes.

faq.question: What amenities are included?
faq.answer: On-site laundry, dedicated parking, responsive leasing support, and updated interior finishes. Placeholder expansion: this can be split into in-home amenities vs community amenities for easier scanning.

faq.question: How quickly are maintenance requests handled?
faq.answer: Routine requests are typically handled in normal business windows, while urgent issues are prioritized. Placeholder expansion: final copy can include average response times and emergency examples.

ui.whyTitle: Designed for Daily Life, Not Marketing Hype
ui.whyDescription: Baba Flats focuses on practical value: efficient layouts, responsive support, connected location access, and day-to-day comfort that holds up over time. Each feature below highlights how the property supports real routines, not just brochure claims.
ui.whyStickyTitle: Practical features that blend into everyday living.
ui.whyStickyDescription: From commute flow and pet routines to support responsiveness and layout efficiency, each decision is designed to reduce friction and improve day-to-day comfort.
ui.neighborhoodStickyTitle: Live close to what matters most.
ui.neighborhoodStickyDescription: Daily essentials, commute routes, and weekend options are all nearby. The neighborhood offers practical convenience while keeping a residential feel.
